testcase.name: testStressResponseTime

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected content-type "JSON" doesn't match actual content-type "text/html; charset=UTF-8".

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Expected content-type "JSON" doesn't match actual content-type "text/html; charset=UTF-8".
